description: This file is a FastAPI-based backend server implementation for a recipe management application, providing endpoints for user authentication, recipe browsing, submissions, reviews, favorites, shopping list management, and admin moderation.

classes.name: schemas.RecipePublic
classes.description: Schema representing publicly visible recipe details.

classes.name: schemas.RecipeListResponse
classes.description: Schema for list of recipes with pagination.

classes.name: schemas.ShoppingListItemPublic
classes.description: Schema for shopping list item details.

classes.name: schemas.ShoppingListItemCreateRequest
classes.description: Schema for adding shopping list item.

classes.name: schemas.ShoppingListItemUpdateRequest
classes.description: Schema for updating shopping list item.

classes.name: schemas.ReviewCreateRequest
classes.description: Schema for creating or updating a review.

methods.name: schemas.HealthResponse health_check()
methods.description: Health check endpoint to verify service availability.

methods.name: schemas.TokenResponse signup(payload: schemas.SignupRequest, db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: Endpoint to create a new user account and issue an access token.

methods.name: schemas.TokenResponse login(payload: schemas.LoginRequest, db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: Endpoint for user login, returning an access token upon success.

methods.name: schemas.UserPublic me(user: User = Depends(get_current_user))
methods.description: Retrieve current authenticated user's public profile.

methods.name: schemas.RecipeListResponse list_recipes( q: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Free-text search against title/description"), cuisine: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Cuisine filter"), diet: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Diet filter"), exclude_allergens: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Comma-separated allergens to exclude (any match excludes)"), include_allergens: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Comma-separated allergens that must be present (all)"), page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number (1-based)"), page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Page size (max 100)"), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Browse and search recipes with optional filters.

methods.name: schemas.RecipePublic get_recipe(recipe_id: int, db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: Get detailed information of a specific recipe.

methods.name: schemas.RecipePublic submit_recipe( payload: schemas.RecipeCreateRequest, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Submit a new recipe for moderation (pending state).

methods.name: schemas.RecipePublic edit_submission( recipe_id: int, payload: schemas.RecipeUpdateRequest, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Edit a pending recipe submission (by author or admin).

methods.name: schemas.FavoriteResponse add_favorite(recipe_id: int, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: Add a recipe to the user's favorites.

methods.name: Response remove_favorite(recipe_id: int, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: Remove a recipe from the user's favorites.

methods.name: list[schemas.RecipePublic] list_favorites(user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: List all recipes favorited by the current user.

methods.name: list[schemas.ShoppingListItemPublic] shopping_list_list(user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: Retrieve the current user's shopping list items.

methods.name: schemas.ShoppingListItemPublic shopping_list_add( payload: schemas.ShoppingListItemCreateRequest, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Add a new item to the shopping list.

methods.name: schemas.ShoppingListItemPublic shopping_list_update( item_id: int, payload: schemas.ShoppingListItemUpdateRequest, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Update an existing shopping list item.

methods.name: Response shopping_list_delete(item_id: int, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db))
methods.description: Delete a shopping list item.

methods.name: schemas.ReviewPublic add_or_update_review( recipe_id: int, payload: schemas.ReviewCreateRequest, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Create or update a review for a recipe.

methods.name: schemas.ReviewListResponse list_reviews( recipe_id: int, page: int = Query(1, ge=1, description="Page number"), page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100, description="Page size"), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: List reviews for a specific recipe.

methods.name: schemas.RecipeListResponse admin_list_submissions( status_filter: Optional[str] = Query(None, description="Filter by status: pending/approved/rejected"), page: int = Query(1, ge=1), page_size: int = Query(20, ge=1, le=100), _admin: User = Depends(require_admin), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Admin: list all user-submitted recipes.

methods.name: schemas.RecipePublic admin_moderate( recipe_id: int, payload: schemas.ModerationUpdateRequest, _admin: User = Depends(require_admin), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
methods.description: Admin: approve or reject a user-submitted recipe.

methods.name: None _on_startup()
methods.description: unavailable

methods.name: schemas.RecipePublic _recipe_to_public(recipe: Recipe, avg_rating: float, review_count: int)
methods.description: unavailable

ctags.name: _recipe_to_public
ctags.pattern: /^def _recipe_to_public(recipe: Recipe, avg_rating: float, review_count: int) -> schemas.RecipePub/

ctags.pattern: /^def add_favorite(recipe_id: int, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(g/
ctags.signature: (recipe_id: int, user: User = Depends(get_current_user), db: Session = Depends(get_db))

ctags.signature: ( recipe_id: int, payload: schemas.ModerationUpdateRequest, _admin: User = Depends(require_admin), db: Session = Depends(get_db), )
